author: Abhishek Kumbhar
name: QNA + SQWA Compression Thesis (8xH100 SXM)
blurb: Non-record 8xH100 SXM submission: controlled 3-run ablation testing whether training for the quantized artifact directly (Quantization Noise Annealing + Stochastic Quantized Weight Averaging) improves post-quantization BPB. QNA reduced quant gap by 7%, QNA+SQWA by 65%, but neither improved the final sliding-window metric. Interesting negative result: the bottleneck in current SOTA is not quantization error.
